title: zornia diphylla var. sericea
intro: Zornia diphylla var. sericea, also known as the silky zornia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of silky zornia include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Silky zornia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
